instruction: Create a complete wave spawner. On BeginPlay, print Wave 1 Starting and start a 15 second looping timer called SpawnWave. Each time SpawnWave fires: increment WaveNumber, print the wave number, spawn enemies equal to WaveNumber times 2 by printing Spawning X enemies, then check if WaveNumber exceeds MaxWaves (default 10). If exceeded, print Victory All Waves Complete, clear the timer. Track EnemiesThisWave variable
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_WaveSpawner
PARENT: Actor

VAR WaveNumber: Int = 0
VAR MaxWaves: Int = 10
VAR EnemiesThisWave: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Wave 1 Starting"]
NODE n3: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="SpawnWave", Time=15.0, Looping=true]
NODE n4: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="SpawnWave"]
NODE n5: GetVar [Variable=WaveNumber]
NODE n6: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n7: SetVar [Variable=WaveNumber]
NODE n8: PrintString
NODE n9: MultiplyFloat [B=2]
NODE n10: SetVar [Variable=EnemiesThisWave]
NODE n11: PrintString
NODE n12: GetVar [Variable=MaxWaves]
NODE n13: GreaterThan
NODE n14: Branch
NODE n15: PrintString [InString="Victory! All Waves Complete!"]
NODE n16: ClearTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="SpawnWave"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute
EXEC n8.Then -> n10.Execute
EXEC n10.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.Then -> n14.Execute
EXEC n14.True -> n15.Execute
EXEC n15.Then -> n16.Execute

DATA n5.Value -> n6.A [Int]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Value [Int]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n8.InString [String]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n9.A [Int]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n10.Value [Int]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n11.InString [String]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n13.A [Int]
DATA n12.Value -> n13.B [Int]
DATA n13.ReturnValue -> n14.Condition [Bool]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_WaveSpawner
PARENT: Actor

VAR WaveNumber: Int = 0
VAR MaxWaves: Int = 10
VAR EnemiesThisWave: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Wave 1 Starting"]
NODE n3: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="SpawnWave", Time=15.0, Looping=true]
NODE n4: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="SpawnWave"]
NODE n5: GetVar [Variable=WaveNumber]
NODE n6: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n7: SetVar [Variable=WaveNumber]
NODE n8: PrintString
NODE n9: MultiplyFloat [B=2]
NODE n10: SetVar [Variable=EnemiesThisWave]
NODE n11: PrintString
NODE n12: GetVar [Variable=MaxWaves]
NODE n13: GreaterThan
NODE n14: Branch
NODE n15: PrintString [InString="Victory! All Waves Complete!"]
NODE n16: ClearTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="SpawnWave"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute
EXEC n8.Then -> n10.Execute
EXEC n10.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.Then -> n14.Execute
EXEC n14.True -> n15.Execute
EXEC n15.Then -> n16.Execute

DATA n5.Value -> n6.A [Int]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Value [Int]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n8.InString [String]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n9.A [Int]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n10.Value [Int]
DATA n9.ReturnValue -> n11.InString [String]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n13.A [Int]
DATA n12.Value -> n13.B [Int]
DATA n13.ReturnValue -> n14.Condition [Bool]

PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay

instruction: Create a wave manager using a different approach. It has WaveCount starting at 1 and a SpawnDelay that starts at 10 and decreases by 1 each wave (minimum 3). On BeginPlay start the first wave. The DoWave custom event prints the wave, spawns enemies, waits SpawnDelay seconds using Delay, increments WaveCount, reduces SpawnDelay, then calls DoWave again if WaveCount is 10 or less
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_WaveManagerV2
PARENT: Actor

VAR WaveCount: Int = 1
VAR SpawnDelay: Float = 10.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Waves Starting!"]
NODE n3: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="DoWave"]
NODE n4: GetVar [Variable=WaveCount]
NODE n5: PrintString
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="Enemies Spawning"]
NODE n7: GetVar [Variable=SpawnDelay]
NODE n8: Delay
NODE n9: GetVar [Variable=WaveCount]
NODE n10: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n11: SetVar [Variable=WaveCount]
NODE n12: GetVar [Variable=SpawnDelay]
NODE n13: SubtractFloat [B=1.0]
NODE n14: Clamp [Min=3.0, Max=10.0]
NODE n15: SetVar [Variable=SpawnDelay]
NODE n16: LessThanOrEqual [B=10]
NODE n17: Branch
NODE n18: PrintString [InString="All Waves Done!"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n8.Execute
EXEC n8.Completed -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.Then -> n15.Execute
EXEC n15.Then -> n17.Execute
EXEC n17.True -> n3.Execute
EXEC n17.False -> n18.Execute

DATA n4.Value -> n5.InString [String]
DATA n7.Value -> n8.Duration [Float]
DATA n9.Value -> n10.A [Int]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n11.Value [Int]
DATA n12.Value -> n13.A [Float]
DATA n13.ReturnValue -> n14.Value [Float]
DATA n14.ReturnValue -> n15.Value [Float]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n16.A [Int]
DATA n16.ReturnValue -> n17.Condition [Bool]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_WaveManagerV2
PARENT: Actor

VAR SpawnDelay: Float = 10.0

NODE n3: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="DoWave"]

EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n8.Execute
EXEC n8.Completed -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.Then -> n15.Execute
EXEC n15.Then -> n17.Execute
EXEC n17.True -> n3.Execute
EXEC n17.False -> n18.Execute

instruction: Create a combat character with Health=100, MaxHealth=100, Armor=10, and IsBlocking boolean. On AnyDamage: if IsBlocking, reduce damage by 50% and print Blocked. Calculate final damage as IncomingDamage minus Armor (minimum 1). Subtract from Health. If Health is at or below zero, print Defeated and destroy. Otherwise print remaining health. Has a custom event ToggleBlock that flips IsBlocking with FlipFlop
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CombatCharacter
PARENT: Actor

VAR Health: Float = 100.0
VAR MaxHealth: Float = 100.0
VAR Armor: Float = 10.0
VAR IsBlocking: Bool = false

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=IsBlocking]
NODE n3: Branch
NODE n4: MultiplyFloat [B=0.5]
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="Blocked!"]
NODE n6: GetVar [Variable=Armor]
NODE n7: SubtractFloat
NODE n8: Clamp [Min=1.0, Max=999.0]
NODE n9: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n10: SubtractFloat
NODE n11: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n12: LessThanOrEqual [B=0.0]
NODE n13: Branch
NODE n14: PrintString [InString="Defeated!"]
NODE n15: DestroyActor
NODE n16: PrintString
NODE n17: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="ToggleBlock"]
NODE n18: FlipFlop
NODE n19: SetVar [Variable=IsBlocking, Value=true]
NODE n20: PrintString [InString="Blocking"]
NODE n21: SetVar [Variable=IsBlocking, Value=false]
NODE n22: PrintString [InString="Not Blocking"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.True -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n3.False -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.Then -> n13.Execute
EXEC n13.True -> n14.Execute
EXEC n14.Then -> n15.Execute
EXEC n13.False -> n16.Execute
EXEC n17.Then -> n18.Execute
EXEC n18.A -> n19.Execute
EXEC n19.Then -> n20.Execute
EXEC n18.B -> n21.Execute
EXEC n21.Then -> n22.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.Condition [Bool]
DATA n1.Damage -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n7.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n7.A [Float]
DATA n6.Value -> n7.B [Float]
DATA n7.ReturnValue -> n8.Value [Float]
DATA n9.Value -> n10.A [Float]
DATA n8.ReturnValue -> n10.B [Float]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n11.Value [Float]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n12.A [Float]
DATA n12.ReturnValue -> n13.Condition [Bool]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n16.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_CombatCharacter
PARENT: Actor

VAR MaxHealth: Float = 100.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

instruction: Create a configurable pickup system. Variables: ItemName (String), ItemCount (Int=1), ItemRarity (String=Common), PointValue (Int=10). On overlap: print Picked up X ItemName. Add PointValue times a rarity multiplier to Score (Common=1, Rare=2, Epic=5 — use branches). If ItemRarity is Epic, also print EPIC FIND. Then destroy
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_ConfigPickup
PARENT: Actor

VAR ItemName: String = "Item"
VAR ItemCount: Int = 1
VAR ItemRarity: String = "Common"
VAR PointValue: Int = 10
VAR Score: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=ItemName]
NODE n3: PrintString
NODE n4: GetVar [Variable=ItemRarity]
NODE n5: EqualString [B="Epic"]
NODE n6: Branch
NODE n7: GetVar [Variable=PointValue]
NODE n8: MultiplyFloat [B=5]
NODE n9: PrintString [InString="EPIC FIND!"]
NODE n10: EqualString [B="Rare"]
NODE n11: Branch
NODE n12: MultiplyFloat [B=2]
NODE n13: GetVar [Variable=Score]
NODE n14: AddFloat
NODE n15: SetVar [Variable=Score]
NODE n16: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.True -> n9.Execute
EXEC n9.Then -> n15.Execute
EXEC n6.False -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.True -> n15.Execute
EXEC n11.False -> n15.Execute
EXEC n15.Then -> n16.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.InString [String]
DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Condition [Bool]
DATA n7.Value -> n8.A [Int]
DATA n4.Value -> n10.A [String]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n11.Condition [Bool]
DATA n7.Value -> n12.A [Int]
DATA n13.Value -> n14.A [Int]
DATA n8.ReturnValue -> n14.B [Int]
DATA n14.ReturnValue -> n15.Value [Int]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_ConfigPickup
PARENT: Actor

VAR ItemName: String = "Item"
VAR ItemCount: Int = 1
VAR ItemRarity: String = "Common"
VAR PointValue: Int = 10
VAR Score: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=ItemName]
NODE n3: PrintString
NODE n4: GetVar [Variable=PointValue]
NODE n5: MultiplyFloat [B=1]
NODE n6: PrintString
NODE n7: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.InString [String]
DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [Int]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_ConfigPickup
PARENT: Actor

VAR ItemName: String = "Item"
VAR ItemCount: Int = 1
VAR ItemRarity: String = "Common"
VAR PointValue: Int = 10
VAR Score: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=ItemName]
NODE n3: PrintString
NODE n4: GetVar [Variable=PointValue]
NODE n5: MultiplyFloat [B=1]
NODE n6: PrintString
NODE n7: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.InString [String]
DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [Int]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]

instruction: Create a game manager. On BeginPlay: set Score to 0, set Lives to 3, set IsGameActive to true, create WBP_HUD widget and add to viewport, print Game Started. Custom event PlayerDied: decrement Lives. If Lives reaches zero, set IsGameActive to false, print Game Over, remove HUD. If Lives remain, print Lives remaining and call a Respawn event. Custom event AddScore: add points to Score, print new score, check if Score exceeds 1000 and print You Win if so
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_GameManager
PARENT: Actor

VAR Score: Int = 0
VAR Lives: Int = 3
VAR IsGameActive: Bool = true

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: SetVar [Variable=Score, Value=0]
NODE n3: SetVar [Variable=Lives, Value=3]
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=IsGameActive, Value=true]
NODE n5: CreateWidget [WidgetClass=WBP_HUD]
NODE n6: AddToViewport
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Game Started!"]
NODE n8: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="PlayerDied"]
NODE n9: GetVar [Variable=Lives]
NODE n10: SubtractFloat [B=1]
NODE n11: SetVar [Variable=Lives]
NODE n12: LessThanOrEqual [B=0]
NODE n13: Branch
NODE n14: SetVar [Variable=IsGameActive, Value=false]
NODE n15: PrintString [InString="Game Over!"]
NODE n16: RemoveFromParent
NODE n17: PrintString
NODE n18: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="AddScore"]
NODE n19: GetVar [Variable=Score]
NODE n20: AddFloat [B=10]
NODE n21: SetVar [Variable=Score]
NODE n22: PrintString
NODE n23: GreaterThan [B=1000]
NODE n24: Branch
NODE n25: PrintString [InString="You Win!"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n8.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n11.Then -> n13.Execute
EXEC n13.True -> n14.Execute
EXEC n14.Then -> n15.Execute
EXEC n15.Then -> n16.Execute
EXEC n13.False -> n17.Execute
EXEC n18.Then -> n21.Execute
EXEC n21.Then -> n22.Execute
EXEC n22.Then -> n24.Execute
EXEC n24.True -> n25.Execute

DATA n9.Value -> n10.A [Int]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n11.Value [Int]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n12.A [Int]
DATA n12.ReturnValue -> n13.Condition [Bool]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Target [Widget]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n16.Target [Widget]
DATA n10.ReturnValue -> n17.InString [String]
DATA n19.Value -> n20.A [Int]
DATA n20.ReturnValue -> n21.Value [Int]
DATA n20.ReturnValue -> n22.InString [String]
DATA n20.ReturnValue -> n23.A [Int]
DATA n23.ReturnValue -> n24.Condition [Bool]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_GameManager
PARENT: Actor

VAR Score: Int = 0
VAR Lives: Int = 3
VAR IsGameActive: Bool = true

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: SetVar [Variable=Score, Value=0]
NODE n3: SetVar [Variable=Lives, Value=3]
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=IsGameActive, Value=true]
NODE n5: CreateWidget [WidgetClass=WBP_HUD]
NODE n6: AddToViewport
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Game Started"]
NODE n8: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="PlayerDied"]
NODE n9: GetVar [Variable=Lives]
NODE n10: SubtractFloat [B=1]
NODE n11: SetVar [Variable=Lives]
NODE n12: LessThanOrEqual [B=0]
NODE n13: Branch
NODE n14: SetVar [Variable=IsGameActive, Value=false]
NODE n15: PrintString [InString="Game Over"]
NODE n16: RemoveFromParent
NODE n17: PrintString
NODE n18: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="AddScore"]
NODE n19: GetVar [Variable=Score]

instruction: Create a simpler game manager. On BeginPlay set GameState to Playing and print Ready. Custom event PauseGame: if GameState equals Playing, set to Paused and print Paused. Custom event ResumeGame: if GameState equals Paused, set to Playing and print Resumed. Custom event EndGame: set GameState to GameOver, print Final Score, clear all timers

instruction: Create a respawn handler. Variables: SpawnPoint (Vector), Health (Float=100), Deaths (Int=0), RespawnDelay (Float=3). On AnyDamage: subtract damage from Health. If Health reaches zero: increment Deaths, print You Died with death count, wait RespawnDelay seconds, set Health back to 100, teleport actor to SpawnPoint, and print Respawned
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_RespawnHandler

VAR Health: Float = 100.0
VAR Deaths: Int = 0
VAR RespawnDelay: Float = 3.0

NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat

NODE n5: LessThanOrEqual [B=0.0]

NODE n7: GetVar [Variable=Deaths]

NODE n9: SetVar [Variable=Deaths]
NODE n10: PrintString [InString="You Died!"]
NODE n11: GetVar [Variable=RespawnDelay]
NODE n12: Delay
NODE n13: SetVar [Variable=Health, Value=100.0]
NODE n14: GetVar [Variable=SpawnPoint]
NODE n15: SetActorLocation
NODE n16: PrintString [InString="Respawned!"]

instruction: Create a timed powerup. Variables: PowerupType (String=Speed), Duration (Float=10), Multiplier (Float=2), IsActive (Bool=false). On overlap: if not already active, set IsActive to true, print PowerupType Activated, apply the multiplier effect by printing Speed Boost x2. Start a timer for Duration seconds. When timer fires, set IsActive to false, print PowerupType Expired, and destroy the pickup
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_TimedPowerup
PARENT: Actor

VAR PowerupType: String = "Speed"
VAR Duration: Float = 10.0
VAR Multiplier: Float = 2.0
VAR IsActive: Bool = false

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=IsActive]
NODE n3: Not
NODE n4: Branch
NODE n5: SetVar [Variable=IsActive, Value=true]
NODE n6: GetVar [Variable=PowerupType]
NODE n7: PrintString
NODE n8: GetVar [Variable=Multiplier]
NODE n9: PrintString
NODE n10: GetVar [Variable=Duration]
NODE n11: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="Expire", Time=10.0, Looping=false]
NODE n12: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="Expire"]
NODE n13: SetVar [Variable=IsActive, Value=false]
NODE n14: PrintString [InString="Powerup Expired"]
NODE n15: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.True -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n9.Execute
EXEC n9.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n12.Then -> n13.Execute
EXEC n13.Then -> n14.Execute
EXEC n14.Then -> n15.Execute

DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Condition [Bool]
DATA n6.Value -> n7.InString [String]
DATA n8.Value -> n9.InString [String]
DATA n10.Value -> n11.Time [Float]

instruction: Create an NPC with IsInConversation boolean, Greeting string defaulting to Hello traveler, and DialogueIndex int. On BeginOverlap: if not in conversation, set IsInConversation true, print the Greeting, set DialogueIndex to 0. On a custom event AdvanceDialogue: increment DialogueIndex, if DialogueIndex equals 1 print I have a quest for you, if equals 2 print Defeat the dragon, if 3 or more print That is all I have to say. On EndOverlap: set IsInConversation false, print Goodbye
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_DialogueNPC
PARENT: Actor

VAR IsInConversation: Bool = false
VAR Greeting: String = "Hello traveler"
VAR DialogueIndex: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=IsInConversation]
NODE n3: Not
NODE n4: Branch
NODE n5: SetVar [Variable=IsInConversation, Value=true]
NODE n6: GetVar [Variable=Greeting]
NODE n7: PrintString
NODE n8: SetVar [Variable=DialogueIndex, Value=0]
NODE n9: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="AdvanceDialogue"]
NODE n10: GetVar [Variable=DialogueIndex]
NODE n11: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n12: SetVar [Variable=DialogueIndex]
NODE n13: EqualInt [B=1]
NODE n14: Branch
NODE n15: PrintString [InString="I have a quest for you"]
NODE n16: EqualInt [B=2]
NODE n17: Branch
NODE n18: PrintString [InString="Defeat the dragon"]
NODE n19: PrintString [InString="That is all I have to say"]
NODE n20: Event_ActorEndOverlap
NODE n21: SetVar [Variable=IsInConversation, Value=false]
NODE n22: PrintString [InString="Goodbye"]

instruction: Create a trap system with IsArmed=true, DamageAmount=30, ResetTime=5. On BeginOverlap: if IsArmed, set IsArmed false, print Trap Triggered, deal DamageAmount by printing damage text, wait ResetTime seconds, then set IsArmed back to true and print Trap Reset. If not armed when triggered, print Trap Recharging. Has a custom event DisarmTrap that sets IsArmed false permanently and prints Trap Disarmed
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_TrapSystem
PARENT: Actor

VAR IsArmed: Bool = true
VAR DamageAmount: Float = 30.0
VAR ResetTime: Float = 5.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=IsArmed]
NODE n3: Branch
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=IsArmed, Value=false]
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="Trap Triggered!"]
NODE n6: GetVar [Variable=DamageAmount]
NODE n7: PrintString
NODE n8: GetVar [Variable=ResetTime]
NODE n9: Delay
NODE n10: SetVar [Variable=IsArmed, Value=true]
NODE n11: PrintString [InString="Trap Reset"]
NODE n12: PrintString [InString="Trap Recharging..."]
NODE n13: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="DisarmTrap"]
NODE n14: SetVar [Variable=IsArmed, Value=false]
NODE n15: PrintString [InString="Trap Disarmed"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.True -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n9.Execute
EXEC n9.Completed -> n10.Execute
EXEC n10.Then -> n11.Execute
EXEC n3.False -> n12.Execute
EXEC n13.Then -> n14.Execute
EXEC n14.Then -> n15.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.Condition [Bool]
DATA n6.Value -> n7.InString [String]
DATA n8.Value -> n9.Duration [Float]
